zh.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd於大約1516年出生在英國坎布利其爾坎布利其。她於1532年與John Duxford在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年2月12日之後在英國賀特福爾阿申維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd于大约1516年出生在英国坎布利其爾坎布利其。她于1532年与John Duxford在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年2月12日之后在英国賀特福爾阿申維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Durd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from Dury, the name of several places in the north of France, e.g. in Aisne, Pas-de-Calais, and Somme, from the Gallo-Roman estate Duriacum.

French and Walloon: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, for someone who lived by a stream, from regional French ry and Walloon ri ‘stream’ (from Latin rivus); or a habitational name for someone from Le Ry, a place e.g. in Wallonia (Belgium). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium. Compare Durieux .
English: either a habitational name from Dury in Lydford, Devon, or a name of French origin (see above), the surname having been taken to England by the Huguenots.

variants.name: Durieux
meanings: French and Walloon: topographic name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, from regional French rieu ‘stream’ (from Latin rivus); or a habitational name for someone from Le Rieu(x), the name of several places in various parts of France and in Belgium (Wallonia), named with this word. Compare Dury and Rieux .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd was born about 1516, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. She married John Duxford in 1532, in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 12 February 1558, in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd est née environ 1516, à Canteburge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John Duxford en 1532, à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 12 février 1558, à Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd wurde um 1516 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1532 in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England John Duxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 12. Februar 1558 in Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd è nata il circa 1516 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. Lei sposato John Duxford nel 1532, nel Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 12 febbraio 1558, nel Ashwell, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durdは約1516年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた。1532年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルでJohn Duxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年2月12日以後にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアシュウエルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd(은)는 대략 1516년 영국 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1532년 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에서 John Duxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 2월 12일 이후 영국 허트퍼드실르 애스h웰에서 사망했다.

Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 12 de fevereiro de 1558, em Ashwell, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Durd родилась около 1516 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Duxford в 1532 г. в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 12 февраль 1558 г. в местности ашвелл, хиртфордшир, Англия.
